title: Add kickoff cleanup command to prune stale agent sessions and worktrees

comments.author: anon-ab6221f8
comments.content: Decided to extract discover_agents() from list() as shared function rather than duplicating discovery logic. cleanup() classifies agents as Done/Stale/Active, respects --force for stale, --keep for retention, and --json for machine output.

comments.author: anon-ab6221f8
comments.content: Delivered: kickoff cleanup command with --dry-run, --force, --keep N, --json flags. Refactored list() to share discovery via discover_agents(). All 737 tests pass. Tested against 31 real worktrees: correctly identifies 22 done, 9 stale, 0 active.
